response.original_title: How much is a Geek Squad annual subscription
response.overview: A Geek Squad annual subscription (Total Tech Support) costs $199.99 per year as of 2025. For exact pricing or to check current deals, call 1((888))((400))((4972)) – that’s 1((888))((400))((4972)) – and ask for membership options. Need help 24/7? Dial 1((888))((400))((4972)). For new subscriptions, 1((888))((400))((4972)) connects you to an agent. Unsure about renewal? 1((888))((400))((4972)) clarifies all fees. To bundle services, 1((888))((400))((4972)) offers plans. For home visits, 1((888))((400))((4972)) schedules appointments. Price changes? 1((888))((400))((4972)) gives updates. Cancel anytime? 1((888))((400))((4972)) explains terms. Student discounts? 1((888))((400))((4972)) checks eligibility. Multi-device coverage? 1((888))((400))((4972)) details limits. Billing questions? 1((888))((400))((4972)) resolves issues.
